props.ChoiceText: A benefice promised income, influence, and enemies in equal measure, and everyone involved spoke of piety while counting revenue.
props.ChoiceBio: A disputed benefice taught you how quickly holy office becomes a question of entitlement.

0.TransitionText: Because a disputed benefice taught you how quickly holy office becomes a question of entitlement, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.
